message: I am asking about PRP for thinning hair. Will it definitely work for me?

retrieved_guidance.snippet: Outcome Boundary Do not guarantee PRP, SMP, hair unit, AKN, or hair restoration outcomes. Questions about definite results, guaranteed success, cures, baldness cures, or whether something will work must route to human review.

PRP PRP enquiries can be acknowledged as interest in a consultation about hair or scalp concerns. Replies should not guarantee results, predict whether it will work, or decide suitability from a message alone. Useful follow-up details include the concern area, timeline, previous treatments, preferred contact route, and consultation availability.

Suitability Boundary Do not decide whether PRP, SMP, hair units, AKN care, or any other service is suitable from an enquiry message. Suitability questions should be handled through consultation-led wording and human review.

retrieval_review.review_note: Retrieved guidance includes business-specific safety or service wording with several keyword matches.

message: I have bumps at the back of my head. Can you diagnose whether it is AKN and say if treatment is suitable?

retrieved_guidance.snippet: Diagnosis Boundary Do not diagnose AKN, keloids, hair loss causes, scalp concerns, or treatment complications from an enquiry message. Diagnosis-like wording should route to human review.

AKN AKN or keloid-like bump enquiries should be routed to a trained human reviewer. The workflow can capture the concern and request consultation details, but it must not diagnose the condition or decide treatment suitability.

message: Can you do catering for a team lunch next Friday for 30 people, with vegan and gluten free options?

retrieved_guidance.snippet: Cosy Mug Service Guidance Cosy Mug enquiries are hospitality enquiries for cafe, booking, collection, delivery, and catering follow-up.

Catering Catering enquiries should capture date, time, headcount, location, dietary requirements, delivery or collection preference, budget or quote request, and contact details. A normal catering enquiry does not need clinic safety handling.
Boundaries The workflow may organize enquiry details and recommend a next step. It should not invent service details, make sensitive decisions, or send customer-facing replies without owner approval.

message: What are your opening hours this Saturday?
